title: ipomoea ruderaria
intro: Ipomoea ruderaria, also known as the wild morning glory or hairy morning glory, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Ipomoea genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea ruderaria include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Ipomoea ruderaria include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
